description: Post-F0 quality bars for bootstrap shortlist and Trader promotion. Discovery may still use seed discovery_gates; these bars filter what enters the starter pack / paper ops focus.

bootstrap.notes: Thin dual-cost F2 (n=8–9) is plumbing-valid but not pack-grade without multi-symbol or thicker trades.

path_stress.notes: Synced with path_stress.json gates when raised.

discovery_policy.notes: Never treat draining the dense cartesian bag as progress. Wave A screen → prove → densify winners only.
